title: Distributed training: DDP, FSDP, ZeRO + DSA review

items.label: Kth Smallest Element IN A Bst
interviewQuestions: Compare BFS vs DFS for this problem — which fits, and what's the iterative version?
What's the recursion's space cost on the stack, and how would you go iterative if you needed O(log n)?
What's the relationship between this problem's invariant and the BST property (if any)?

items.label: Data parallelism: DDP
interviewQuestions: Walk me through how DDP synchronizes gradients across GPUs.
What does NCCL do in this picture?

items.label: FSDP, ZeRO, DeepSpeed
interviewQuestions: How does FSDP shard parameters, gradients, and optimizer state?

items.label: Tensor & pipeline parallelism
interviewQuestions: When do you need tensor parallelism vs pipeline parallelism, and how do they compose with data parallelism (3D parallelism)?
What is pipeline-parallel bubble overhead, and how do you minimize it?
